title: Small earthquake reported in south-central Nebraska
body: USGS reported a magnitude 2.8 earthquake about 4 miles east-southeast of Cowles, Nebraska, Monday morning.

title: Earthquake rattles area near Brawley, CA: 2.5 magnitude reported on May 9
body: IMPERIAL COUNTY, CA - A 2.5 magnitude quake shook near Brawley on Saturday evening, according to the U.S. Geological Survey.
